name: Pork, Potato, and Green Bean Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless pork loin, trimmed of fat, cubed
4 red potatoes, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the pork loin, potatoes, onion, and garlic with 1 can chicken broth in a skillet over medium heat for 5 to 10 minutes.
2. Transfer the mixture to a crock-Pot.
3. In a small bowl, combine 3/4 cup chicken broth and flour. Set aside.
4. Add the remaining broth, green beans, Worcestershire sauce, thyme, and pepper to the crock-Pot and stir.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
6. If cooking on Low, turn the setting to High and stir in the flour mixture. Cook an additional 30 minutes to thicken.
7. Serve. Serves 8
